Entry Level & Licensed Insurance Agents

General Information

Location: Florida, Leesburg

Description & Requirements

Entry Level & Licensed Insurance Agents 
We’re seeking motivated, driven individuals who are eager to launch a rewarding career in the insurance industry. As an AmeriLife Health & Life Insurance Agent, you’ll play a critical role in helping clients protect what matters most—while building a lucrative, long-term career with unlimited growth potential. 
At AmeriLife, you won’t be limited to just one carrier. Our agents represent 50+ top-rated insurance companies, giving you the flexibility and product breadth to truly serve your clients’ needs with confidence and integrity. 

What You’ll Do 
  • Deliver exceptional customer experiences by educating and guiding clients through informed insurance decisions 
  • Conduct personalized needs assessments to identify appropriate life, health, and retirement solutions 
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with both new and existing clients 
  • Use provided and proven sales tools, marketing resources, and leads to grow your book of business 
  • Operate with professionalism, integrity, and a client-first mindset 

What We’re Looking For 
  • Self-motivated individuals with a strong desire to succeed 
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for personal growth 
  • A genuine interest in helping others plan for their future 
  • Valid driver’s license and reliable transportation 
  • No prior insurance experience required—we provide training 

What We Offer 
  • Comprehensive Training & Development Online coursework, classroom instruction, and hands-on field training to set you up for success 
  • Robust Leads Program Access to direct mail campaigns, seminars and workshops, digital and media leads, and more 
  • High Earning Potential Industry-leading commissions, advanced commissions on many products, weekly pay, and NEW daily pay on select products—no income caps 
  • Career Advancement Opportunities Clear paths for growth with a strong promote-from-within culture 
  • Top-Tier Tools & Support 
  • AmeriLife-provided iPad with full access to proprietary sales tools 
  • Professional, custom-designed marketing materials 
  • Dedicated and responsive home office sales support 
  • Licensing Support 
  • Assistance with pre-licensing, fingerprinting, and state insurance exams for qualified candidates 

If you’re ready to build a meaningful career with flexibility, earning potential, and long-term stability—and want to become a trusted agent in the insurance industry—we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and take the first step toward your future with AmeriLife.
Apply
